checklist: boot the patched ROM and confirm it reaches the title screen cleanly
start or load into a normal early-game state without hang or corruption
confirm visible HUD and world state look sane
confirm no obvious file-start or screen-transition regressions are visible
confirm the artifact feels like a clean bugfix patch rather than a broken conversion

operator_notes: Loaded in Snes9x, but the ROM appeared to hang or crash as soon as the window was clicked. This behavior was observed on both standalone patched ROM artifacts, so the failure may be in the emulator/input interaction path rather than the patch logic itself.
